# Amin Pashna

> Engineer at Microsoft based in Seattle, Washington. Database and cloud specialist with 14+ years of experience in SQL Server, Microsoft Azure, and data engineering. Holds 34 professional certifications.

## About

Amin Pashna is a database and cloud engineer at Microsoft, specializing in SQL Server administration and development, large-scale database systems, and cloud data warehousing on Microsoft Azure. He has over 14 years of professional experience building mission-critical, high-availability data systems for global organizations.

His expertise covers database replication, mirroring, log shipping, query performance optimization, MongoDB administration, and cloud data warehousing. He has architected replication pipelines across 20+ global servers and managed SQL Server environments spanning versions 2005 through 2016, including SQL Server on Linux.

He is also actively expanding into AI engineering, with certifications in Azure AI, Generative AI, Large Language Models, and Agentic AI architectures.

## Experience

- **Microsoft** — Engineer (April 2021 – Present), Seattle, WA. Working on large-scale data and engineering initiatives, contributing to cloud infrastructure and database systems.
- **Universal Electronics** — Senior Data Engineer (November 2019 – March 2021). Designed and maintained data pipelines for global consumer electronics operations.
- **iHerb Inc.** — Senior Database Administrator (April 2011 – November 2019), 8 years 8 months. Managed SQL Server environments across versions 2005–2016, architected replication across 20+ global servers, implemented HA via mirroring and log shipping, and administered MongoDB for high-volume NoSQL workloads.

## Education

- Islamic Azad University

## Specialties

- **Database:** SQL Server, MongoDB, T-SQL, Query Optimization, Replication, Mirroring, Log Shipping
- **Cloud & Azure:** Microsoft Azure, Azure Storage, Cloud Data Warehousing, Azure AI
- **Engineering:** Data Engineering, High Availability, Disaster Recovery, Performance Tuning, ETL Pipelines
- **Development & AI:** JavaScript, Generative AI, Large Language Models, Agentic AI, SQL Server on Linux

## Notable Certifications

- Microsoft Certified: Azure AI Fundamentals (Oct 2025)
- Azure Storage Essential Training (Oct 2025)
- Manage Storage in Azure (Oct 2025)
- Agentic AI Solution Communication Architectures (2025)
- Generative AI: Working with Large Language Models (2025)
- The AI-Driven Software Developer: Optimize, Innovate, Transform (2025)
- 34 total professional certifications across Microsoft and LinkedIn Learning

## Endorsement

"Amin is very smart and articulate. He knows SQL Server better than anyone that I know. He is the most efficient and effective DBA that I have had the pleasure to work with. Amin's true strength is working on projects that are cutting edge. I recommend Amin to anyone looking for a top level SQL Server DBA and/or Developer."
— Robert Henderson, Sr. Database Administrator/Developer (January 2019)
